scripts.typecheck:backend: pnpm --dir apps/backend exec node ./node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --noEmit --incremental false -p tsconfig.json
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build
scripts.validate: pnpm format:check && pnpm prisma:generate && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test:backend && pnpm build:frontend && pnpm build:backend && pnpm test:proxy
scripts.validate:backend: pnpm prisma:generate && pnpm typecheck:backend && pnpm test:backend && pnpm build:backend
scripts.validate:frontend: pnpm typecheck:frontend && pnpm build:frontend && pnpm test:proxy
scripts.prisma:status: pnpm --dir apps/backend exec node ./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js migrate status
scripts.prisma:migrate: pnpm --dir apps/backend exec node ./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js migrate dev
scripts.prisma:migrate:deploy: pnpm --dir apps/backend exec node ./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js migrate deploy
scripts.prisma:seed: pnpm --dir apps/backend exec node ./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js db seed
